snippet.title: Thalaivi | Official Trailer (Hindi) | Kangana Ranaut | Arvind Swamy | Vijay | 23rd April
snippet.description:
The superstar heroine, the queen of romance and the one who rose to power despite a patriarchal political system. 
The story we all know, the life story we don’t know. 
#Thalaivi, Releasing on 23rd April!

Starring Kangana Ranaut, Arvind Swamy, Nassar, Bhagyashree, Raj Arjun, Madhu Bala

Director: Vijay

Producers: Vishnu Vardhan Induri & Shaailesh R Singh

Co Producers: Hitesh Thakkar & Thirumal Reddy

DOP: Vishal Vittal

Music: GV Prakash

Creative Producer: Brinda Prasad

Who will win it all? Catch all the action on Voot - https://voot.onelink.me/eIb4/88673b6d

Unacademy Road Safety World Series is a Twenty20 extravaganza in association with the Road Safety Cell, Government of Maharashtra! #UnacademyRoadSafetyWorldSeries #BattleOfTheLegends #RoadSafetyWorldSeriesOnVoot #RSWS #Unacademy #Cricket #T20 #Voot #ColorsCineplex #UnacademyAskTheExpert #LetsCrackIt #IndiaLegends #SriLankaLegends #SachinTendulkar #VirenderSehwag #Thilakartna Dilshan #SanathJayasuriya

India Legends Squad : Sachin Tendulkar (C), Virender Sehwag, Yuvraj Singh, Mohammed Kaif, Zaheer Khan, Pragyan Ojha, Noel David, Munaf Patel, Irfan Pathan, Manpreet Gony, Yusuf Pathan, Ashok Dinda, Naman Ojha

Sri Lanka Legends Squad : Thilakartna Dilshan (C), Upul Tharanga, Chamara Silva, Chinthaka Jayasinghe, Thilan Thushara Mirandu, Dhamika Prasad, Rangana Herath, Chamara Kapugedera, Dulanjana Hettithantrige, Nuwan Kulasekera, Russel Arnold, Ajantha Mendis, Farveez Maharoof, Sanath Jayasuriya

GAURAV MARWAHA

• Voice of Hiroshi Nohara, Bunta Takakura (Principal Sir) & Action Kamen in the anime series Shinchan, since 2006.

• Voice of Nakagawa in the anime series Kochikame.

• Many other Popular character voices in lots of series & movies like Doraemon etc.

• Voice of Silver Surfer in Fantastic Four (1994 TV series).

• Voice of Daredevil in Spider-Man (1994 TV series).

• Voice of WWE Hindi for many years.

• Voice of hundreds of Documentaries & many award-winning series on Discovery Channel, National Geographic Channel etc.

snippet.title: Bepanah Pyaar (Official Teaser) Payal Dev, Yasser Desai| Surbhi Chandna, Sharad Malhotra | Shabbir A
snippet.description:
Hold on tight & fasten your seat-belts, this story is going to take you on an unexpected journey, where love knows no limits. VYRL Originals brings to #BepanahPyaar in the soulful voice of Payal Dev and Yasser Desai. Starring the popular duo from Naagin 5 - Surbhi Chandna & Sharad Malhotra who reunite for this love story, with music by Payal Dev and lyrics penned by Shabbir Ahmed and Payal Dev, the music video has been directed by Arif Khan, releasing on the 24th of March 2021 at 11AM.

Bachchan, Ileana D'Cruz, Nikita Dutta, Soham Shah, Ram Kapoor, Supriya Pathak, Saurabh Shukla and Mahesh Manjrekar in a special appearance. The film is set to releasing on 8th April 2021.

snippet.title: Baarish Ki Jaaye | Teaser | B Praak Ft Nawazuddin Siddiqui & Sunanda Sharma | Jaani | Arvindr Khaira
snippet.description:
A Soulful melody of two hearts filled with love and emotions. #Baarishkijaaye where love will have a New meaning. Releasing on 27th March. The only way love can last a lifetime is if it's unconditional . The Bollywood King Nawazuddin Siddiqui and pollywood queen Sunandha Sharma is all set to take you all to there Dream world . The song is Sung by one of the finnest vocalist B Praak and penned down by Star Maker Jaani . The song is based on true story .   

Starring :-  Nawazuddin Siddiqui & Sunanda Sharma 
Singer :- B Praak 
Music :- B Praak 
Lyrics & Composer :- Jaani
Video :- Arvindr Khaira

snippet.title: MARJANEYA - Neha Kakkar | Rubina Dilaik & Abhinav Shukla | Anshul Garg | Babbu | Rajat Nagpal
snippet.description:
Anshul Garg presents Marjaneya by Neha Kakkar ft. Abhinav Shukla & Rubina Dilaik.

Stream the full song here:

Gaana: https://gaana.com/song/marjaneya-1
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/0fZJoLBwD8ja2Hg8tCPImu?si=Uv0zhihaQxSy2b2MoZZMDw&utm_source=whatsapp
Resso: https://m.resso.app/ZSJFqrpMU/

Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/in/album/marjaneya-single/1558134197?at=1l3v9Tx&uo=4&app=itunes
YouTube Music: https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=rmc8ijIKpxY&feature=share


Singer - Neha Kakkar
Music - Rajat Nagpal
Lyrics - Babbu
Music arranged & produced by Rajat Nagpal 
Guitars Shomu Seal 
Recorded @ Studio 504 by Rahul Sharma Assist by Samir Dharap

Featuring - Abhinav Shukla & Rubina Dilaik

Producer - Anshul Garg

Video Director - Rajan Bir 
Video Supervisor - Raghav Sharma
Co-Director - Anmol Randhawa 
Dop - Shinda Singh
Project Manager - Piyush Chandak
Choreographer - Sumit Kumar 
Assistant Choreographer- Robin Singh
Editor - Gaurav K Mehra 
Di - Onkar 
VFX - Prathmesh Chaukekar​ ,Prathmesh Sampada Parab 
Art Director - Karma Art Studio 
Jimmy Jib - Manish Arora
Production - Fateh Film Production
Abhinav Shukla & Rubina Dilaik Stylist - Ashna Makhijani Shah
Neha's team:
Styled by - Outro  By Akshita & Anulika
Make-up - Ritika Vats
Hair by - Rita Shukla
Photo by - Piyush Mehra
Artwork - Vicky Sandhu
Distribution - Believe Digital
Promotions - Underdog Digital



Lyrics -
Karda rahen ignore ve mainu
Labhgyi lagda hor ve tenu
Je tu pyar naal rakhna hi nahi 
Fer tu vapis tor ve mainu
Ik paasa karde yaar.. Asi tere nahi rehna
Marjaaneya tu hun nahi karda pyar..Asi tere nahi rehna

Tethon ramdev ton ve routine nahi chadya janda
Tu reliance chalauna hain..Tethon time nai kadhya janda
Tethon ramdev ton ve routine nahi chadya janda
Tu reliance chalauna hain..Tethon time nai kadhya janda

Kade bahr laja
Koi film dikha
Kade pyar naal
Koi gal sunaa
Banya rehnaa talwar asi tere nai rehna
Marjaneya
Tu hun nahi karda pyar asi tere nai rehna

Koi labh lyi hou chudail 
Chakkar koi paaya lagda
Sade pichon ve muuh
Kaala karvaaya lagda
Koi labh lyi hou chudail 
Chakkar koi paaya lagda
Sade pichon ve muuh
Kaala karvaaya lagda

Sanu milna nahi 
Milauna nahi
Babbu je pyar
Jatauna nahi
Ki pauna fer achaar Asi tere nahi rehna
Marhanevala
Tu hun nahi karda pyar asi tere nai rehna



#NehaKakkar #RubinaDilaik #AbhinavShukla

snippet.title: Chacha Vidhayak Hain Humare season 2 Teaser Auqaat aur Sapne - Zakir khan
snippet.description:
Chacha Vidhayak Hain Humare 

In Season 2 the stakes rise considerably for well-meaning and fun-loving neighborhood hero Ronny Bhaiya, as he navigates the world of politics and fights to keep his place in Humari Party as Chachaji's favorite youth leader. With him at all times are his beloved family and two best friends...and the promise of romance... Packed with even more laughter and bigger obstacles...here is a sneak peak at Season 2. 

Starring Zakir Khan, Kumar Varun, Vyom Sharma, Abhimanyu Singh, Sunny Hinduja, Zakir Hussain, Alka Amin, Venus, Onima Kashyap

Written by Ayush Tiwari, Utkarsh Porwal and Zakir khan

Directed by Shashant Shah

Executive Producer Aliya Curmally 

Produced by Zakir Khan, Rasika Tyagi, Ajay Nair
On OML Entertainment Production

With him at all times are his beloved family and two best friends...and the promise of romance... Packed with even more laughter and bigger obstacles...here is a sneak peak at Season 2. 

Starring Zakir Khan, Kumar Varun, Vyom Sharma, Abhimanyu Singh, Sunny Hinduja, Zakir Hussain, Alka Amin, Venus, Onima Kashyap

Written by Ayush Tiwari, Utkarsh Porwal and Zakir khan

Directed by Shashant Shah

Executive Producer Aliya Curmally 

Produced by Zakir Khan, Rasika Tyagi, Ajay Nair
On OML Entertainment Production

snippet.title: Yuvarathnaa Trailer - Kannada | Puneeth Rajkumar | Santhosh Ananddram | Thaman S | Hombale Films
snippet.description:
Watch the Power Packed Trailer of Yuvarathnaa , An upcoming Kannada and Telugu film from the hit trio Puneeth Rajkumar, Santhosh Ananddram & Hombale Films.

A government aided college, RK University, is on the verge of completing its golden jubilee but a bizarre event shuts it down indefinitely. Will RK University restore its lost glory?

Movie Details:
Movie Name: Yuvarathnaa
Produced by: Vijay Kiragandur 
Production House : Hombale Films
Story, Written & Directed by : Santhosh Ananddram
Cast : Puneeth Rajkumar, Sayyeshaa Saigal, Dhananjaya, Prakash Raj, Diganth, Sonu Gowda, Tharak Ponnappa, Vishal Hegde, Avinash, Prakash Belawadi, Sai Kumar, Sudharani and others.
Music: S. Thaman
Cinematography: Venkatesh Anguraj
Editor: Jnaanesh B Matad
Stunt : Ram-Lakshman, Anbu-Arivu, Vijay Master, Dhilip Subbarayan
Choreography : Jaani Master, Sirish Master, Chinni Prakash.
Executive Producer : Karthik Gowda
Costumes & Styling : Yogi G Raj
VFX & DI : Igene, Chennai
Poster Design : Kaani Studios, Dhani Aelay
OOH Media : Avinashi Ads, Khushi Ads.
Art : Shivakumar

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - तारक मेहता का उल्टा चशमाह - Episode 755 - Full Episode
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to SAB TV Channel: https://www.youtube.com/user/sabtv?sub_confirmation=1

Click to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7Zfu1x9Bd1UqLwUxhZ1oBJh

The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

snippet.title: തലകറക്കം വന്നാൽ ഉടനെ ഇങ്ങനെ ചെയ്താൽ മതി | Vertigo Home Remedies in Malayalam | Arogyam
snippet.description:
തലകറക്കം എളുപ്പം മാറാൻ ചെയ്യേണ്ട കാര്യങ്ങൾ  - What is vertigo, Causes, Symptoms and Treatment in Malayalam.

ചെവിയുടെ അസുഖം കാരണം വരുന്ന തലകറക്കം മാറാൻ ചെയ്യേണ്ട കാര്യങ്ങൾ. Positional Vertigo Exercises - Dr. Aju Ravindran (Senior Consultant - ENT, Starcare Hospital, Kozhikode) സംസാരിക്കുന്നു..

കൂടുതൽ അറിയാൻ വിളിക്കൂ  : 0495 2489 000, 949 5728 201

Exercises for Vertigo: 4 Options to Try for Relief:
Start in an upright, seated position.
Move into the lying position on one side with your nose pointed up at about a 45-degree angle.
Remain in this position for about 30 seconds (or until the vertigo subsides, whichever is longer). Then move back to the seated position.
Repeat on the other side.

Feel free to comment here for any doubts regarding this video.

IBC24 is a media and news organization. Its Head office is in Raipur, the state capital of Chhattisgarh. This channel is providing primarily regional news of Madhya Pradesh & Chhattisgarh besides national, International, sports and other main news of public interests. Our wide network of reporters in rural and urban areas has made us one of the most reliable news channels of Madhya Pradesh and Chhattisgarh. 

We have a history of providing reliable news in matters pertaining to local, national and international significance. Many times our onscreen coverage has been picked up by various national and international news channels. snippet.title: एकबार बनायेगें तो महिनों भर खायेंगे नमकीन ऐसी की मार्केट की नमकीन खाना तो भूल ही जायेंगेSuji Namkeen
snippet.description:
एकबार बनायेगें तो महिनों भर खायेंगे नमकीन ऐसी की मार्केट की नमकीन खाना तो भूल ही जायेंगेSuji Namkeen

#SoojiKiNamkeen#SnacksRecipe#HoliSpecial

Ingredients :-

Semolina-1 cup
Boiled Potatoes-4
Peanut-1 cup
Almonds-1/4 cup
Cashew Nuts-1/4 cup
Raisins-1/4 cup
Curry Leaves-15-20
Red Chilli Powder-1-1/2 tsp
Chat Masala-1 tsp
Powder Sugar-2 tsp
Black Pepper Powder-1/2 tsp
Black Salt-1/2 tsp
Salt-to taste
Oil For Frying

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - तारक मेहता का उल्टा चशमाह - Episode 754 - Full Episode
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to SAB TV Channel: https://www.youtube.com/user/sabtv?sub_confirmation=1

Click to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7Zfu1x9Bd1UqLwUxhZ1oBJh

The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

snippet.title: Online Class Mein Disturbance! | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा Ep 3127
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu) 
Gurucharan Singh/ Balwinder suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi 
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku

Artist: Dino James
Composed and Written by Dino James
Music: Bluish Music ( Nilesh Patel)
Mix & Master: Abhishek Ghatak
Recording Engineer: Mansi
Vocal Dubbing Studio : AMV Studios
Producer: Jimmy Enterprises
Directed and Edited by Himanshu Tyagi
DOP: Mikhaeil Shah
Executive Producer: Prashant Sharma
Colorist: Harsh
 
Dance Team: V company
Location: V company studios
Choreographer: Vernon Monteiro
Assistant Choreographer: Axi
Featured Dancers: Rajendra, Jayesh, Rahul, Shivam, Santosh, Mosin, Anil, Jainam, Nikhil, Amit, Vaibhav, Tushar, Himanshu, Siddhesh, Rohit
 
Lyrics:
 
“कीड़े”
 VERSE 1:
baahar se kaafi mai mai seedha sa ladka tha, ander se thoda sa sanki
jab baki ke bollywood gane baja rahe the,mujhe toh rappers pasand the
daddy ne bola tum business sambhalo ,par mujhe pasand nahi the dhande
andar he andar kuch hone laga, kuch kide karne lage pange….
 
kido ne raato ko jagaya
kido ne body bhi banaya
kido ne bola ki mamuli nahi hai tu
dino ko dino se milaya
 
Dheele logo se toh mujhe hai allergy
Dheele se rapping hai dheele hai melody
chodo yeh pange aur chodo yeh jealousy
Diss na karna yeh lage hai parody
 
Kabhi mai pagal hu kabhi mai Mehnati
mujhe na roko mai karunga Tarraki
meri road khali hai, zara na gardi
gane bana nahi deta mai therapy
 
gano mai susti nahi , gano mai Sheelajeet
suno toh energy energy energy energy energy energy energy
 
hathi phasega nahi chuhedani mai
Reti toh pani mai ghulega nahi be
bhale yeh log tujhe yeda bulaye
par marne na paye kide sulemani ke
 
tez mai bhaag raha jo bhi mile,  mujhe kehte hai beta ji dheere
mai fast nahi tu slow…khud ko dekh le...tu mujhe kya bol raha dheele
mai toh kehta hu tum dharti par ho …. par hum toh bus taaro mai jee re
na... jeene de ,jeene de,jeene de,jeene de,jeene de,jeene de 
Keede

VERSE 2:
aunty ne bola ki beta lazy hai , pata nahi kya hoga career
kisi bhi cheezo mai josh nahi hai, pada rehti hai yeh mariyal
fir doctor ke paas wo leke gaye fir bola sir kuch toh kariyae
doctor ne bola ki dino ko suno tum, body mai kido ki kami hai

Ab aise ki taisi re desi pilao
Duniya ko todenge, JCB Lao
Kido ki suni mast bana pulaav
velee baithe, chalo lade chunao
 
bache jo singer the gane nahi gate hai
cricketer bachhe ab tuition ko jate
pucho ki kya hua toh roke batate hai
papaji chinese hai kido ko khate hai
 
papaji aisa na karo yaar
bacho ke kido ko maro nahi
kuch bada karega toh famous ho jaoge
famous ho jayegi caaloni
 
kya karu ander ki chool ka mai
rule aur usool ke school ka mai, yeeh
babool ki daal hai, phool kum hai
sun dhool se aaya hu full dum hai
 
aise luul se raparoo mai huul kum hai
ab Clueless hoke bus tu jhoolta reh
mujhe keede bole bus beta dhoodhta reh
sare tool hai paas -  dino  tootta nahi
 
Past bhool nahi, tabhi raja phoolta nahi
Meri bhool bhuliya mai ghum ghoomta reh
tu jaanta khoob hai Who’s the next
Bus swag mai bete mujhe ghoorta reh
Keede
 
#DinoJames #Keede #HipHop #Drill

Follow Dino James:
www.instagram.com/dinojms
www.facebook.com/dinojms
www.twitter.com/dinojimmyy

snippet.title: How To Become Physically Strong? Podcast #3
snippet.description:
Sandeep Maheshwari is a name among millions who struggled, failed and surged ahead in search of success, happiness and contentment. Just like any middle class guy, he too had a bunch of unclear dreams and a blurred vision of his goals in life. All he had was an undying learning attitude to hold on to. Rowing through ups and downs, it was time that taught him the true meaning of his life.

To know more, log on to www.sandeepmaheshwari.com

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/sandeepmaheshwaripage
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/sandeep__maheshwari
Twitter: https://twitter.com/sandeepseminars

#Podcast #Fitness #Health

snippet.title: TTL’s Ek College Reunion Aisa Bhi ft. Chandan Anand, Pooja Singh, Pratish Mehta
snippet.description:
When the woes of adulting take over and we are stuck doing our dead-end corporate jobs, college reunions provide the much-needed respite we wish for. Be it to catch up with old friends, to sort out past differences, to relive old memories or maybe just to do a little show off, college reunions are always a mix of fun and nostalgia! But not all reunions are like that. To know what things can possibly go wrong in a college reunion, watch out this sketch by The Timeliners titled Ek College Reunion Aisa Bhi.

Aur jab woh college ke yaaron-doston wali yaadein dobaara taaza karni ho toh uthaiye Mic aur jamaiye rang Saregama Carvaan Karaoke ke sangg.. isme aate hain 1000 preloaded Karaoke tracks aur 2 stylish mics bhi.. along with 5000 preloaded evergreen songs, 20000 additional songs and 280+ podcasts.

snippet.title: क्या मिल पाएगा Bhide को Solution?-Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah-तारक मेहता -Ep3127-22nd March,2021
snippet.description:
Click here to watch the full episode of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
https://www.sonyliv.com/dplnk?schema=sony://asset/1000112125#utm_source=YOUTUBE&utm_medium=slate&utm_campaign=YT_traffic

Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-and-mehta-s-misunderstanding-1000104091?watch=true

Episode 3127: Bhide Complains About Online Classes
---------------------------------------------------------
Jetha, Taarak, and Anjali have gathered at Bhide's house to listen to his problem regarding online classes. He tells that students have become careless towards studies and that they are being encouraged by their parents for such behavior. Bhide is tired and wants some solution in order to improve his classes. watch the full episode now.


More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: BIGGEST EGG ROLL | Rolled Egg Omelette with 1000 Eggs | Korean Street Food Recipe Cooking In Village
snippet.description:
Today in our village, we cook king size egg roll recipe using 1000 eggs. This egg recipe is most like omelette recipe but it is different in korean streets by rolling omelette and make it to the sliced to serve.

We use big size pan to make the biggest egg roll recipe! While eating the omelette is so different from a normal omelette and its taste also delicious!

snippet.description:
Website - https://bit.ly/3snQOXE
  Amazon - https://bit.ly/37FMj2X
 Flipkart - https://bit.ly/37FMj2X
Coupon code: DON10 valid only on Ustraa website

➤ USTRAA Ayurvedic Hair Oil 
1.USTRAA Ayurvedic Hair Oil nourishes hair with extracts of 8 natural herbs extracts, which helps provide complete nourishment to your hair. 
2.Promotes healthy scalp & long hair. 
3.Helps control dandruff. 
4.Ashwagandha - helps to strengthen hair, restores vitality & relieves stress. 
5.Trifala It's a mixture of three types of fruits namely nourishes hair, helps to grow hair black & fights hair damage. 
6.Amalaki (Amla) - comes with Vitamins (incl. Vit C) & minerals which stimulate hair growth & keeps the scalp clean. 
7.Its light formulation, easy to absorb, and comfortable to use while being true to its Ayurvedic roots.

Infinitum Media presents Thondara Padaku Sundara Vadhana , a rom com featuring Don Pruthvi over a series of love stories through the course of his life. What happens due to his attitude of rushing through life and love forms the series.

snippet.title: Roman Reigns Spears Edge & Daniel Bryan | 20th March, 2021 | WWE Smackdown
snippet.description:
After the fight between Edge and Jey Uso came to a conclusion when Edge hit Uso with the spear for the win. This win means Edge will be the special ringside enforcer for WWE Universal Championship Match at FastLane. But after the match was over, Roman Reigns attacked Edge with the spear and Daniel Bryan to tap him out. Uso attacked Bryan and then Reigns proceeds to hit Bryan with the spear.

snippet.title: TRS MLA Haripriya Banoth EXCELLENT Speech On Scholarships | Telangana Assembly 2021 |YOYO TV Channel
snippet.description:
TRS MLA Haripriya Banoth EXCELLENT Speech On Scholarships | Telangana Assembly 2021 |YOYO TV Channel
#BanothuHaripriya #TSAssembly #CMKCR
#TelanganaAssemblyLive​​​​ #TelanganaBudget2021​​​​ #CMKCR​​​​ #YOYOTVChannel​​​​ #HarishRaoLive​​​​ #RagunandanRaoLive​​​​ #TamilisaiSoundararajanLive​​​​ #KCRLive​​​​

The state Budget session will commence on Today with Governor Tamilisai Soundararajan addressing the joint sitting of the Assembly and the Legislative Council. Finance minister T. Harish Rao will present the Budget 2021-22 on March 18.

The graduate MLC poll results are likely to generate political heat in the Assembly as the results will be out in the midst of the session. The counting begins on March 17 and the results are expected Tuesday.

Besides, the BJP will have a second member in the Assembly, M. Raghunandan Rao who won from Dubbak in December 2020. The BJP previously had one legislator, Raja Singh.

After the Governor's address, the Business Advisory Committee (BAC) chaired by Speaker Pocharam Srinivas Reddy will meet to decide on the duration of the session. The government wants to hold the session until March 27, according to official sources.
However, there is a possibility of the session being curtailed again in view of the increasing Coronavirus cases.

On March 16, the House will take up condolence motions for deceased sitting and former members. On March 17, the House will debate on the motion of thanks to the Governor's address.

snippet.title: Master Ji Ka Bhoot - Amit Bhadana
snippet.description:
Do badmash students ne kar rakha hai apne master ji ki naak mein dum aur is duniya mein nahi hai unka koi bhi ilaaj. Par kya karenge vo dono jab master ji dosari duniya se mangne ayenge jawaab? Is kahani mein hum aapko parlok ki sair karayenge, thoda sa darr lagega par bahut sara hansayenge. Masterji ki class mein attendance lagao aur bakiyon ko bhi le kar aao.

Follow Me On Instagram & Twitter ⬇️

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/theamitbhadana

Twitter: https://twitter.com/iAmitBhadana

snippet.title: 'Bhaago Bhoot Aaaya😧' Roman Reigns TAPPED OUT, The Fiend Returns - WWE Fastlane 2021 Highlights
snippet.description:
Topics Covered In Video-
1) WWE Fastlane 2021 Highlights & Full Show Results in Hindi
2) The Fiend returns at Fastlane 2021 with new look and mask
3) Roman Reigns taps out against Daniel Bryan
4) Alexa Bliss def. Randy Orton 
5) The Fiend attacks Randy Orton
6) The Fiend new mask 2021

#WWEFastlane #Fiend #RomanReigns

'Bhaago Bhoot Aaaya😧' Roman Reigns TAPPED OUT, The Fiend Returns - WWE Fastlane 2021 Highlights

WWE FASTLANE 2021 FULL MATCHES RESULTS -
Riddle def. Mustafa Ali for US Championship
 Nia Jax and Shayna Baszler def. Bianca Belair and SmackDown Women’s Champion Sasha Banks to retain the WWE Women’s Tag Team Championship
— Big E def. Apollo Crews to retain the WWE Intercontinental Championship
— Braun Strowman def. Elias
— Seth Rollins def. Shinsuke Nakamura
— Drew McIntyre def. Sheamus in a No Holds Barred Match
— Alexa Bliss def. Randy Orton
— Roman Reigns def. Daniel Bryan to retain the WWE Universal Championship (Special Enforcer: Edge)

➤ Lyrics
Muhabath Muhabath ninjodanen muhabath..
Kismath Kismath oonodanen Kismath.. (2)
Eee nenjinulinulil kerikoodiya kuthrath.. 
Eee nottam kandath muthalen manasil thoniya izath.. 
Haajathanenum nin mizhikandenude qalbil tharichann.. 
              (muhabath) 

Qalb pidakan nenjj thudikan oonte monjath kaanumbol.. 
Ishk viriyanu imbam thonanu badharotha oon enne nokumbo..  (2)

Arabikadhayile sulthan poloru jinnaane .. 
Rangkil viriyana chiriyath kanan chelaane.. 
Nin pennay dhuniyavil njan mathiiii..... 
                (Muhabath) 
Vattamugath chuttiya thattam kond marachoru mugaminn.. 
Suruma kannil nee nokumbo pirisham enil koodun..  (2)

Nin punjiriyil nin kande njanoru muhabathin kood.. 
Niramerum mazhavilil charthiya ninude monjazhak.. 
Nin pennay dhuniyavil njan mathee .....

Muhabath Muhabath ninjodanen muhabath..
Kismath Kismath oonodanen Kismath.. (2)
Eee nenjinulinulil kerikoodiya kuthrath.. 
Eee nottam kandath muthalen manasil thoniya izath.. 
Haajathanenum nin mizhikandenude qalbil tharichann.. 
              (muhabath)

മുഹബത് മുഹബത് നിന്നോടാണെൻ മുഹബത്..
കിസ്മത് കിസ്മത് ഓനോട്‌ണെൻ കിസ്മത്..
മുഹബത് മുഹബത് നിന്നോടാണെൻ മുഹബത്..
കിസ്മത് കിസ്മത് അത് ഓനോട്‌ണെൻ കിസ്മത്.. 
ഈ നെഞ്ചിനുള്ളിനുളിൽ കേറിക്കൂടിയ കുദ്റത് .. 
ഈ നോട്ടം കണ്ടത് മുതലെന്‍ മനസ്സിൽ തോന്നിയ ഇസത് .. 
ഹാജതാണെന്നും നിൻ മിഴിക്കണ്ടെന്നുടെ ഖൽബിൽ തറിച്ചന്ന്.. . 
              (മുഹബത്) 

ഖല്ബ് പിടക്കണ് നെഞ്ജ് തുടിക്കണ് ഓന്റെ മൊഞ്ചത് കാണുമ്പോൾ.. 
ഇഷ്‌ക് വിരിയണ് ഇമ്പം തോന്നണു ബധറോത്ത ഓൻ എന്നെ നോക്കുമ്പോൾ .. (2)
അറബിക്കഥയിലെ സുൽത്താൻ പോലൊരു ജിന്നാ നീ .. 
റെങ്കിൽ വിരിയണ ചിരിയത് കാണാൻ ചേലാണെ ..
നിൻ പെണ്ണായ് ദുനിയാവിൽ ഞാൻ മതീ ..... 
                (മുഹബത്) 

വട്ടമുഖത് ചുറ്റിയ തട്ടം കൊണ്ട് മറച്ചൊരു മുഖമിന്ന് .. 
സുറുമ കണ്ണിൽ നീ നോക്കുമ്പോൾ പിരിശം എന്നിൽ കൂടുന് .. (2)
നിൻ പുഞ്ചിരിയിൽ ഇന്ന് കണ്ടേ ഞാനൊരു മുഹബത്തിൻ കൂട്. . 
നിറമേറും മഴവില്ലിൽ ചാർത്തിയ നിന്നുടെ മൊഞ്ചഴക് ..
നിൻ പെണ്ണായ്‌ ദുനിയാവിൽ ഞാൻ മതീ .....

                (മുഹബത്)

നിൻ പെണ്ണായ്‌ ദുനിയാവിൽ ഞാൻ മതീ .....
